---
title: "Final Report: [Your Project Title]"
date: 2026-06-04
author: "Your Name"
---

# Final Report: [Your Project Title]

## Introduction

Replace this with an introduction to your research question or project. What are you investigating? Why does it matter?

## Methods

Describe how you conducted your analysis. What data did you use? What analyses did you perform?

## Results

Share your findings here. You can include:

- Text explanations
- Tables
- Figures and visualizations
- Code examples (if relevant)

### Example Code Block

Here's a sample R code block:

```r
# Load a library
library(ggplot2)

# Create some sample data
data <- data.frame(
  x = 1:10,
  y = rnorm(10)
)

# Make a plot
plot(data$x, data$y)
```

### Example Table

| Method | Result | P-value |
|--------|--------|---------|
| Analysis 1 | Significant | 0.01 |
| Analysis 2 | Not Significant | 0.15 |

## Discussion

What do your results mean? How do they relate to your research question? What limitations exist? What would you do next?

## Conclusions

Summarize your findings and their implications.

## References

Add any references to papers, data sources, or resources you used.

---

**Last updated:** June 2026
